title: Virtuoso/7: nested query breaks on transaction time out
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Sample A', 10.5), (2, 'Sample B', NULL), (3, 'Sample C', 20.0);
SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 5 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'Sample%');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
key_bug_features: nested query fails on transaction time out with large datasets
